reviews.comment: RUN!!! This class was one of the worst classes I have taken thus far. Everyday the professor belittles me and other students. She is condescending and believes that she is ultimate law, forgetting that we are adults. Everyday is a new battle, and I cannot believe that she is still allowed to teach here.

Absolutely avoid taking this class by any means necessary. ANY!!! She belittles her students, forgets how to teach topics, refuses to let you take a different class, and humiliates you if you ask questions or ask her to explain her work.

She humiliates students in front of the whole class and then makes jokes as a way of showing she's sorry (she's not). She'll skip over certain parts of the lesson because she forgot how to do it or asks how we as students would solve it. There's been times she assigns homework on things we haven't even learned yet. She's just not good at teaching.

Mrs. Jones was actually a really kind person however she held unrealistic expectations for her students. It was too much homework and the lessons she taught in class were way different than the homework. It's not the end of the world if she's your professor but good luck!

Please be ready to do 5 pages in two days, while also reading and commenting on a self help book that has nothing to do with mathematics. There aren't many professors that make me dislike subjects, but she is one of them. Made me consider changing my major so I wouldn't have so much math.

Lisa is a very sweet person but she isn't a good teacher. She has random bursts of happiness at like 8am which is annoying. She grades hard and if it's not done her way then it's wrong. Her TAs suck a lot. Cried a lot during my first semester because of this class. Didn't learn anything. I wouldn't take her if I needed to.
one word playing a video game on impossible level.
All I would say is get ready

The teacher was too hard for no apparent reason and made the class a very stressful environment. I have lost lots of sleepover this class and my mental health had worsened. Overall if you are in this class try your best to leave and get out of it because the suffering is bad. This class is so terrible it has given me permanent anxiety and headaches

Do not take this class, you will regret it.  She was impossible, disrespectful, and made this class WAY harder than it needed to be.  I will drop out before I ever sit though a class with her again.  She frequently messed things up and humiliated students insisting they were wrong when she couldnt do basic math.  This class made me hate my life.

Mrs. Jones is a gem. She's caring, funny, cheerful, and knows her stuff. She's strict but kind. I had her for two semesters back to back; there is not a more engaging teacher. She is always available outside class. She taught me how to understand math in a way that wasn't just putting things into a calculator. She genuinely cares about you.
